name: Northern Vietnam Soft Adventure 8 days
duration: Places:Hanoi - Ky Son Village  - Mai Chau - Ninh Binh - Halong Bay
highlights: Admire the pure beauty of the Northern forested mountainous wonder like mountains, paddy fields, caves and villages on a private trip
Get insights about the lifestyle of the minority people in Vietnam
Visit Vietnam Old Capital, Ninh Bình - a charming place in harmony of picturesque river and ancient temples
Absorb in the glistening beauty of the UNESCO Heritage Halong Bay on a cruise
Join locals on a motorbike for street food tour in the dynamic lifestyle of Hanoi

itinerary.title: Hanoi Arrival
itinerary.description:
When you arrive at Noi Bai International Airport, our guide will be waiting to greet you and transfer you to your hotel in Hanoi. After the check-in process, you can take some time to rest, or have a little self exploration around the city if you prefer. Or else, for anyone want to use the the time staying in Hanoi to the fullest, we highly recommend joining our optional private tour, which promises a memorable experience:

Hanoi Street Food Tour

	

FROM US $29 /pax




Hanoi Food Tour by Motorbike at Night

	

FROM US $78 /pax

NOTE: The check-in time is at 14:00, but early check-in is avail...

itinerary.title: Hanoi - Ky Son Village - Sightseeing Biking
itinerary.description:
Morning

Commence your day with a hearty breakfast at your hotel, and at approximately 08:00, your tour guide will rendezvous with you to embark on a minibus journey to Ky Son Village - an enchanting ancient village in Northern Vietnam. Upon reaching Ky Son Village, settle into your accommodation - a homestay surrounded by a picturesque garden offering captivating views of green paddy fields and Ba Vi Mountain. Immerse yourself in the life of the upland minority culture and their tradition of:

Sip a cup of local tea at the homestay and enjoy free time to explore its traditional architectural ...

itinerary.title: Ky Son - Mai Chau - Admire scenery on bicycle
itinerary.description:
Morning

Embark on your journey to Mai Chau Valley by minibus at 10:00, enjoying a scenic ride that lasts approximately 2.5 hours, including a brief stop along the way. Enjoy a traditional Vietnamese lunch at noon, with Vegetarian options available. Afternoon

Optionally, explore the countryside by bicycle to admire terraced fields and observe local life (Additional cost applies). Spend free time cycling, walking through the village, or shopping for local handicrafts. Immerse yourself in the cultural richness of Mai Chau as you wind down for the night.

itinerary.title: Mai Chau - Ninh Binh - Tam Coc - Bich Dong Pagoda
itinerary.description:
Morning

At 08:00, your personal chauffeur will transport you to Ninh Binh, Vietnam's inaugural capital, renowned for its rich historical landmarks. Embark on a bike ride or hop on a buffalo cart to traverse the village, discovering churches, schools, and paddy fields while immersing yourself in the tranquil local life. Afternoon

Following lunch, venture to Tam Coc and Bich Dong Pagoda. Glide through three natural caves on a sampan, marveling at the breathtaking natural scenery of towering limestone cliffs, meandering rivers, and picturesque rice paddies. If your visit aligns with the ripe ri...

itinerary.title: Ninh Binh - Halong Bay Overnight Cruise
itinerary.description:
Morning

Begin your day with a hearty breakfast at the hotel. Between 08:00 and 08:30, a minibus will transfer you to Halong Bay, a UNESCO World Heritage site located in North Vietnam known for its stunning limestone islands and islets emerging from the emerald waters. The journey to the cruise port takes approximately 2.5 hours. Upon arrival, meet the cruise staff who will guide you through the check-in process and offer a welcome drink as you embark on the cruise. The boarding time is around noon

itinerary.title: Discover Halong Bay On Cruise
itinerary.description:
Morning

Commence your day with invigorating Tai Chi exercises on the sundeck, or opt for a Yoga or Vovinam class, depending on the cruise itinerary. Following the morning exercises, board a small boat for a full-day exploration of Halong Bay. As you navigate through the stunning landscapes, absorb the awe-inspiring views and immerse yourself in the natural beauty that surrounds you. Engage in thrilling activities in the bay, such as kayaking, swimming, cave visits, or cycling, contingent on the cruise itinerary. Afterwards, everyone returns to the main boat and savors a delectable lunch at th...
itinerary.accommodation: Overnight on board in Halong Bay

itinerary.title: Halong - Hanoi
itinerary.description:
Morning

Indulge in a light breakfast aboard the cruise, relishing the serene beauty of the sunrise. Check out and enjoy brunch as you cruise back to the port. Around 11:30, disembark the cruise, bid farewell to the boat crew, and meet your private driver who will transfer you back to your hotel in Hanoi for check-in. Afternoon

Arriving in Hanoi approximately between 15:00 and 15:30, take some time to relax and recharge for an enchanting street food tour in the evening. Immerse yourself in the vibrant culinary scene of the city and savor the diverse flavors

itinerary.title: Hanoi Departure
itinerary.description:
Morning

Before being taken to the airport for your flight by our driver, you still have spare time in the morning to enjoy the last moments of this lovely Hanoi city. Bid farewell, we are thankful that you chose us as companions and hope you have a memorable Northern Vietnam trip!

NOTE: The hotel check-out time is at 12:00. Please contact your travel consultant if you need a late checkout.

included: Accommodation in TWN/ DBL sharing accommodation at hotel except home-stay (if any)
All transport within Vietnam (including airport pick up & see off), as per itinerary
All in-tour stationed local English speaking guide.
Entrance fees for Vietnam attractions, as per itinerary
Meals as indicated in the program
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
